steps.description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, create new segmentation as "Cranial_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation node with name 'Cranial_Segmentation'

ui_guidance.title: Create Cranial Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Open Segmentation Editor module, create new segmentation named 'Cranial_Segmentation'.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node with name 'Cranial_Segmentation'

steps.description: In the "Sourve Volume" selection section of "Segmentation Editor" module, choose the volume for segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the source volume for segmentation
sub_operations.question: Choose the volume for segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select Source Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Pick the volume to use for segmentation.

steps.description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Add" botton to add a new segment as "Cranial_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment' to the segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Add Cranial Segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add' to create a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment'.

operation_descriptions: Add a new segment named 'Cranial_Segment' to the segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Threshold" botton.

sub_operations.description: Open the Threshold effect in Segmentation Editor

ui_guidance.title: Open Threshold Tool
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Threshold' button to open threshold settings.

operation_descriptions: Open the Threshold effect in Segmentation Editor

steps.description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, set the Threshold Range including the lowest value and the largest value.

sub_operations.description: Set the threshold range (min and max values)
sub_operations.question: Set the threshold range (lowest and largest value).

choice_info.question: Set the threshold range (lowest and largest value).

ui_guidance.title: Set Threshold Range
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter the lowest and largest threshold values.

steps.description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Apply" botton.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold effect to create initial segmentation

operation_descriptions: Apply the threshold effect to create initial segmentation

steps.description: In the "Skull Mask" section, choose the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Choose the skull mask segment node (the segmentation node containing the skull mask)
sub_operations.question: Choose the skull mask segment node.

choice_info.question: Choose the skull mask segment node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Skull Mask
ui_guidance.instruction: Pick the segment node that represents the skull mask.

sub_operations.description: Load the selected skull mask segment into the extension

ui_guidance.title: Load Skull Mask
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Load Skull Mask' to load the selected mask.

sub_operations.description: Add an ROI markup node for defining the skull region

ui_guidance.title: Add ROI
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add ROI' to create a region of interest.

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundary of the ROI to keep the skull part.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the ROI boundary to cover the desired skull region

ui_guidance.title: Adjust ROI Boundary
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the skull region.

sub_operations.description: Crop the skull mask to the ROI

ui_guidance.title: Crop to ROI
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Crop to ROI' to crop the segmentation to the ROI.

steps.description: In the "Markups" module, click the "Closed Curve" to create a closed curve node.

sub_operations.description: Create a new closed curve markup node

ui_guidance.title: Create Closed Curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Markups module, click 'Closed Curve' to create a closed curve.

operation_descriptions: Create a new closed curve markup node

steps.description: Manually draw the curve on the skull model to include the fractured skull part.

sub_operations.description: Draw the defect boundary on the skull model using the closed curve

ui_guidance.title: Draw Curve Around Defect
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the skull model to place points defining the closed curve around the fracture.

steps.description: In the "Curve selection" section, choose the Curve node.

sub_operations.description: Select the drawn curve node for defect cutting
sub_operations.question: Choose the curve node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Curved Node
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the curve node from the list.

sub_operations.description: Cut the defect region from the skull mask using the selected curve

ui_guidance.title: Cut Defect
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Cut Defect' to remove the fractured region.

sub_operations.description: Generate the implant from the defect region

ui_guidance.title: Generate Implant
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Generate Implant' to create the implant model.
